overview: Alphagenics offers testosterone replacement therapy, medical weight loss programs, and wellness peptide services with personalized treatment plans. The clinic provides lab work, medication, and supplies with no hidden fees, featuring convenient at-home injection options and no requirement for weekly office visits.
highlights: At-home injection options and no weekly office visits required
Includes lab work, medication, and supplies with no hidden fees
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement therapy and anyone interested in medical weight loss or wellness optimization.
